title: NormalizedPayload
description: The minimal, flat, field-bounded object the model actually sees. Only artifact from the legacy data source that reaches conversation history (FR-002, FR-004, FR-006). Token count of this object must be <= 30% of the RawToolResponse it replaces (SC-001).

tool_use_id.description: Same id as the originating RawToolResponse. Keeps the audit <-> context link inspectable.

status.description: Resolved status. Flat, single-object by design (Principle III). When code == 'unknown', the raw arcane code is preserved in 'raw' (FR-003, SC-003).

code.description: Either the human-readable label from the StatusMapping, or the literal 'unknown'. Never a guessed or fabricated label.

raw.description: Non-null iff code == 'unknown'; carries the original arcane code. Null when the code was successfully resolved.

content.description: Cleaned, legacy-markup-free content extracted from the raw payload. Flat or shallow by design: values are strings, numbers, booleans, or shallow arrays of those. No value may contain '<', '>', or CDATA sentinels (FR-004, SC-002).

parse_status.description: 'ok' on clean parse; 'degraded' on malformed input (Edge: malformed); 'empty' on no-body responses (Edge: empty).

notes.description: Short, bounded list of machine diagnostics (e.g. 'unclosed_tag_recovered'). Never contains model-facing prose or speculation.
